title: The Mega Hyper Heroes
description: Marco, Johnny, Diana, and Ricky put their rings together and become the Mega Hyper Heroes. The Changeling, Flame-O, Ms. Invisible, and The Bolt are defenders of the universe.
quote: Okay, Mega Hyper Heroes. We’ve got a Metalitron to recycle.
altHero: the kids putting their rings together
alt1: Metalitron splitting a giant boulder above its head
alt4: Metalitron typing up the heroes with The Changeling as a snake
